description: Search Tip: So you don't have to scroll through pages of addresses on your state page, do this: With Windows, press Control, letter F, with Mac press Command, letter F, then type in your city, zip code, or other search criteria, such as esq. for an attorney. Try zip codes for other nearby towns. Those listings containing an asterisk (*) have sponsored a Wrightslaw conference.

description: Alaska Special Education Handbook 2015 (3/23/2017) Alaska Autism Resource Center (AARC) 3501 Denali Street, Suite 101 Anchorage, AK 99503 (907) 334-1300; (866) 301-7372; (907) 562-0545 (fax) Email: aarc | at | sesa.org Web: http://www.sesa.org/aarc/ Serving the needs of individuals with Autism Spectrum Disorders, their families, caregivers, and service providers throughout the state of Alaska via information, referral, training, and consultation.

name: Anchorage School District STEP Center
city: Anchorage School District STEP Center 5530 East Northern Lights Blvd. Anchorage
description: Anchorage School District STEP Center 5530 East Northern Lights Blvd. Anchorage, AK 99504 (907) 742-3872; (907) 742-3867 (fax) Email: stepnotes | at | asdk12.org Web: http://www.asdk12.org/step/ The Anchorage School District STEP Center (Student-Educator-Parent Center) is a disability information & resource center serving Anchorage. The Center has an extensive lending library & helps parents find answers and information.

Box 1681 Sitka, AK 99835 (907) 747-7311; (907) 747-3769; (907) 747-3368 (fax) Email: momcbride | at | hotmail.com I am an Occupational therapist with over 30 years experience.
